name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Cream White and Blue Enamel/Medium】This Capucines Medium handbag features soft, elegant tones that highlight the classic silhouette. Delicate chains link metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shimmer. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked in to reveal the LV logo. size:31.5x20x11cm
